creator: rezny@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Jan Beich (mail not working) from comment #4)

I was going to suggest trying 1.3.1 since it was released today but it appears you are ahead of me. If I understand your last reply correctly, there is no problem and no need for the patch if beignet is built with OpenCL 2.0 support enabled, correct?
